note: Maker-facing factory surface. create=cover (on-chain native limit order open -> Amm::SignIntentOrder, OnchainTx, reuses the order-sign Action shape with address_from_uint256 on the AddressLib-packed Order fields). The per-order clone (NativeOrderImpl) cancelOrder/withdraw maker functions live at non-fixed CREATE2 clone addresses (child-address universe) -> DEFERred separately, NOT on this factory. IMPLEMENTATION/owner=view; rescueFunds/transferOwnership/renounceOwnership=owner-only admin. (IMPLEMENTATION/owner view fns dropped from coverage per surface gate I1' — coverage lists external-mutating fns only.)

0x8c72b608.name: create
0x8c72b608.reason: maker (msg.sender) opens an on-chain native limit order: create((uint256x8)=IOrderMixin.Order) with msg.value==makingAmount. salt/maker/receiver/makerAsset/takerAsset/makingAmount/takingAmount/makerTraits all in calldata (addresses AddressLib-packed uint256 -> address_from_uint256) -> Amm::SignIntentOrder on OneInchLimitOrder venue, order_kind=limit (the on-chain twin of order-sign@1.0.0). single_emit.
